leadText: The Metal Coat (Japanese: メタルコート Metal Coat) is a type of held item introduced in Generation II. It allows Onix and Scyther to evolve into Steelix and Scizor, respectively, and also increases the power of the holder's Steel-type moves.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Held item 1.1.1 In battle 1.1.1.1 Generations II and III 1.1.1.2 Generation IV onward 1.2 Outside battles Effect [ edit | edit source ] Held item [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generations II and III [ edit | edit source ] Increases the power of Steel-type moves used by the holder by 10%. Generation IV onward [ edit | edit source ] Increases the power of Steel-type moves used by the holder by 20%. Outside battles [ edit | edit source ] Causes Onix to evolve into Steelix and Scyther to evolve into Scizor when traded while holding it, which consumes the Metal Coat. They will not evolve if linking to a Generation I game. In Pokémon Legends: Arceus , due to the absence of held items, the Metal Coat simply needs to be used on Onix or Scyther to trigger the Evolution, though the item is still consumed.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] If the player offers both a Link Cable and Metal Coat at Luminous Cave or Luminous Spring , Onix or Scyther can be evolved into Steelix or Scizor , respectively. This consumes the Link Cable and Metal Coat. If thrown, it will deal 1 damage (2 if sticky ). Using this item in a dungeon will consume it, with no effect.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Metal Coat is required to evolve certain Pokémon in Pokémon Sleep. It is consumed upon use. Onix requires 80 Onix Candy , a Metal Coat, and a Linking Cord to evolve into Steelix .

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generations II and III [ edit | edit source ] Increases the power of Steel-type moves used by the holder by 10%. Generation IV onward [ edit | edit source ] Increases the power of Steel-type moves used by the holder by 20%.
